## Summary

Describe the observable behavior changed and why.

## Security and data impact

State any effect on authorization, persisted data, credentials, external calls,
or destructive actions. Write `None` when there is no effect.

## Validation

- [ ] A failing test demonstrated each behavior change or defect.
- [ ] Relevant targeted tests pass.
- [ ] The full test suite passes.
- [ ] Ruff, compile, lock, and diff checks pass.
- [ ] Architecture or security documentation is updated when contracts changed.
- [ ] No credentials, local state, or private conversation data are included.

## Remaining limitations

List known gaps, manual gates, or follow-up work.
